faq.question: What services are included with professional Christmas light installation?
faq.answer: Our professional installation includes custom lighting design tailored to your home or business, all Christmas lights and dÃ©cor provided and professionally installed, ongoing maintenance throughout the holiday season, full takedown after the season ends, and all lights removed and stored at our facility â no storage required on your end.

faq.question: What kind of lights do you install?
faq.answer: We install two types of lighting: Seasonal Lighting â commercial-grade C9 LED bulbs that are 3x brighter than anything you'll find at a big-box store, with every display custom-fit to your home. Permanent Lighting â Invisilights permanent lighting systems.

faq.question: Am I buying the lights?

If anything needs attention during the season, we handle it. â Permanent Lighting â Yes. Permanent lighting systems are purchased and professionally installed on your home.
